svg.title: UART block diagram
svg.desc: Top-level UART block diagram showing baud rate generator, TX module, RX module, and their connections
svg.text: TX loopback to RX (for simulation testing)
UART frame structure (8N1 — 8 data bits, No parity, 1 stop bit)

g.text: D0 — D7 (8 data bits, LSB first)
Each bit held for 1 baud period

svg.text: clk, rst (global inputs to all modules)
